title: To Rosemary And Bays.
content:
My wooing's ended: now my wedding's near
    When gloves are giving, gilded be you there.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "To Rosemary And Bays.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
